title: How to Use Claude Code for Free with Gemini, DeepSeek & OpenRouter
excerpt: Learn how to use Claude Code with free AI models like Gemini and DeepSeek using OpenRouter. Complete setup guide in under 2 minutes.
content: Claude Code is one of the most powerful AI coding assistants, but many users think they need an Anthropic subscription to use it. In reality, you can connect Claude Code to OpenRouter and access free models like Gemini and DeepSeek. This guide walks you through the complete setup process.
seo_title: Use Claude Code for Free with Gemini & DeepSeek via OpenRouter
seo_description: Step-by-step guide to connect Claude Code with OpenRouter and use free AI models like Gemini and DeepSeek.
seo_keywords: claude code free, openrouter claude code, gemini claude code, deepseek claude code, ai coding assistant
author: Midhun NK

subtopics.title: 1. Install Claude Code
subtopics.details: The first step is installing Claude Code on your machine. Open your terminal and run the installation command below.

subtopics.title: 2. Open Antigravity and Paste the Setup Prompt
subtopics.details: Launch Antigravity and paste the setup prompt from the guide or PDF. This prompt will generate the configuration required for OpenRouter integration.

subtopics.title: 3. Create an OpenRouter API Key
subtopics.details: OpenRouter lets you access multiple AI providers through a single API. Create a free API key and copy it for the next step.

subtopics.title: 4. Configure Your Preferred Model
subtopics.details: Paste your OpenRouter API key into Antigravity and select the model you want Claude Code to use.

subtopics.title: 5. Generate settings.json Automatically
subtopics.details: Antigravity automatically creates the required settings.json configuration and redirects Claude Code requests through OpenRouter.

subtopics.title: 6. Restart Terminal and Launch Claude Code
subtopics.details: After configuration is complete, restart your terminal and launch Claude Code normally. It will now use the selected OpenRouter model.

subtopics.title: 7. Benefits of This Setup
subtopics.details: This setup gives you flexibility to switch between different AI providers without being locked into a single model ecosystem.
